title: Sanborn Fire Insurance Map from Texarkana, Bowie County, Texas, October 1885 sheet manifest
repository: Library of Congress Geography and Map Division
credit_line: Library of Congress, Geography and Map Division, Sanborn Maps Collection.

claim_boundary.verified_fact: The LOC item and gallery metadata verify the title, October 1885 publication date, public-domain status, and five sheet count.
claim_boundary.source_based_inference: Building identities, street alignments, and gameplay-relevant map features must be extracted and reviewed before becoming source-based inferences.
claim_boundary.fictional_gameplay: This manifest creates no fictional gameplay records.
